meta.title: ICS Detection Challenge: Phase 2 Detection
meta.description:
Claroty, Gravwell, Nozomi and Security Matters competed in the ICS Detection Challenge at S4x18. This was a test of specialized ICS products that do detection purely through passive analysis of captured packets.

In this session the results from the Detection Phase of the Challenge are revealed followed by an interview with the winner Claroty. 

A more detailed analysis of the Challenge is available at https://dale-peterson.com/category/detect/
